metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the Karpathy-inspired skill pack: 14 working methods distilled from Andrej Karpathy's public posts, plus 1 methodology router. Unofficial curation, not endorsed by Andrej Karpathy.

plugins.name: karpathy-skills
plugins.description: 14 Karpathy-inspired working methods + 1 methodology router, distilled from his 2023-2026 public X posts and Gists into executable agent skills: agentic-engineering, vibe-to-agentic, autoresearch, llm-simulator, llm-wiki, minimalism, supply-chain-hygiene, understanding-first, idea-files, output-evolution, education-first, system-prompt-learning, practice-environments, meta-reflection. Every skill cites its original source. Unofficial, not endorsed by Andrej Karpathy.
